title: Basic JavaScript Data Structures
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Data Structures. Focus on implementing Stack implementation correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Data Structures
description: Create a function that uses Stack implementation and Queue implementation together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Data Structures Project
description: Build a small application that applies Stack implementation, Queue implementation, Linked list (singly/doubly) in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Data Structures
description: The following code has bugs related to Stack implementation. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Data Structures
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Stack implementation and Queue implementation.
